rows.label: tev078301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Orleron about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Orleron about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_SEL1001
rows.name: Ask Orleron about the Zaruboggan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Orleron about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Is what Vera told me true? *fsssh* If
you humans don't secure your Central
Life soon, you will be destroyed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0002
rows.name:
What a fragile existence
you seem to lead. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0003
rows.name:
*fsssh* I doubt there's anything that I could
do, but rest assured I would act without question.
I hope you can recover your Lifepoint soon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0004
rows.name:
Vera is quite important to... Well,
rather I should say that all humans
are indispensable. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0005
rows.name:
If you were to be destroyed, we Zaruboggan that
were left behind in this city would quickly run
out of voltant and disappear ourselves. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0010
rows.name:
Thank you very much! *fsssh* Because
of your advice, I was able to improve
my relationship with Vera.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0011
rows.name:
As a sign of reconciliation, we've been
discussing the possibility of my joining
her on some fieldwork. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0012
rows.name:
We'd be scavenging for animal corpses
and highly toxic voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG0013
rows.name:
I suppose this is what humans
would call a date? *fsssh* I am
quite looking forward to it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1001
rows.name:
At first, I thought of Zaruboggan
as pathetic creatures, inseparably
chained to our calling. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1002
rows.name:
But I've since encountered humans in
NLA who have lost sight of their
purpose and fallen into deep despair.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1003
rows.name:
It made me think that perhaps
there is value in the simplicity
of my people's lives? *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1004
rows.name:
Take my father, Arsenican. So long as he has
voltant to devoltanize, he knows true happiness
and feels not a care in the world. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1005
rows.name:
I imagine that to a human full
of worries, his life might seem
an enviable one. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1010
rows.name:
Hey, [ST:playername ]! *fsssh* Thanks for
your help back in Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1011
rows.name:
Since that day, I've continued
working with a group of BLADEs to
search for Miran voltant. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1012
rows.name:
But I promise that I'm not being a drag on them!
BLADE seems to have plenty of use for a guy like
me who's willing to follow them anywhere. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1013
rows.name:
So they're happy, and I get to fulfill
my Zaruboggan calling in a way only
I could. Everyone wins! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078301_MSG1014
rows.name:
But of course, I can still have some
fun while I'm at it! We should get
together for a game of tennis. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]
